findings.evidence: `rg -n "trace_eq_zero_of_sq_ratCast\b|trace_eq_zero_of_sq_ratCast_of_not_mem_range\b"` finds roadmap mentions at `roadmap/TauCetiRoadmap/EffectiveBounds/README.md:26,98`, but only the suffixed theorem in code at `code/TauCeti/FieldTheory/Trace.lean:106`.
findings.fix: Rename the public theorem to `trace_eq_zero_of_sq_ratCast` or add that exact theorem as the public API and avoid exposing a duplicate suffixed wrapper unless there is a real second use case.
findings.issue: The roadmap target names the public helper `trace_eq_zero_of_sq_ratCast`, but the PR only exports `TauCeti.NumberField.trace_eq_zero_of_sq_ratCast_of_not_mem_range`, so the intended downstream API name is missing.

summary: The exported surface is otherwise narrow, but the roadmap-named trace helper is not actually exposed under the name downstream users are told to use.
